mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.id as conversation_id, c.name, c.type, c.avatar, c.last_message_id, c.last_active_time, c.creator_id, m.content as last_message_content, cm.unread_count, u1.real_name as sender_name, u1.avatar as sender_avatar, u2.real_name as receiver_name, u2.avatar as receiver_avatar FROM conversations c JOIN conversation_members cm ON c.id = cm.conversation_id AND cm.is_left = 0 LEFT JOIN messages m ON c.last_message_id = m.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON m.sender_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON m.receiver_id = u2.id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.last_active_time DESC

SELECT m.*, u1.real_name as sender_name, u1.avatar as sender_avatar, u2.real_name as receiver_name, u2.avatar as receiver_avatar FROM messages m LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON m.sender_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON m.receiver_id = u2.id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sent_time DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cm.unread_count), 0) FROM conversation_members cm JOIN conversations c ON cm.conversation_id = c.id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.is_left = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0

SELECT m.*, u1.real_name as sender_name, u1.avatar as sender_avatar, u2.real_name as receiver_name, u2.avatar as receiver_avatar FROM messages m LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON m.sender_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON m.receiver_id = u2.id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId}) AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sent_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT c.id FROM conversations c JOIN conversation_members cm1 ON c.id = cm1.conversation_id AND cm1.is_left = 0 JOIN conversation_members cm2 ON c.id = cm2.conversation_id AND cm2.is_left = 0 WHERE c.type = 'PRIVATE' AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND cm1.user_id = #{userId1} AND cm2.user_id = #{userId2} LIMIT 1
